title: Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
company: Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
